title: The Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy Act, 2017
full_text: The Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy Act, 2017 भारतीय पेट्रोलियम और ऊर्जा संस्था्न अधिनियम,2017 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201803 Act Number: 03 Enactment Date: 2018-01-05 Act Year: 2018 Short Title: The Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy Act, 2017 Hindi Title: भारतीय पेट्रोलियम और ऊर्जा संस्था्न अधिनियम,2017 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its incorporation and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto Ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas Enforcement Date: 22nd January, 2018, vide notification No. S.O. 272(E), dated 17th January, 2018, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii) TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy Act, 2017 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration of Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy as an institution of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation of Institute. Section 5. Constitution of Board of Governors. Section 6. Term of office of, vacancies among, and allowances payable to, members of Board. Section 7. Vesting of properties. Section 8. Effect of incorporation of Institute. Section 9. Functions of Institute. Section 10. Powers of Board. Section 11. Institute to be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 12. Teaching at the Institute. Section 13. Visitor. Section 14. Authorities of Institute. Section 15. Constitution of General Council. Section 16. Powers and functions of General Council. Section 17. Senate. Section 18. Functions of Senate. Section 19. President of Board. Section 20. Director. Section 21. Registrar. Section 22. Powers and duties of other authorities and officers. Section 23. Grants by Central Government. Section 24. Fund of Institute. Section 25. Setting-up of endowment fund. Section 26. Budget of Institute. Section 27. Accounts and audit. Section 28. Annual report. Section 29. Pension, provident fund, etc. Section 30. Authentication of orders and instruments of Institute. Section 31. Appointment. Section 32. Statutes. Section 33. Statutes how made. Section 34. Ordinances. Section 35. Ordinances how made. Section 36. Conduct of business by authorities of Institute. Section 37. Tribunal of Arbitration. Section 38. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies. Section 39. Grant of degrees, etc., by Institute. Section 40. Sponsored schemes. Section 41. Control by Central Government. Section 42. Resolution of differences. Section 43. Power to remove difficulties. Section 44. Transitional provisions. Section 45. Statutes, Ordinances and notifications to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament.
